requirement_topic.en: Bahamas BPL Grid Interconnection — 120/240 V, 60 Hz NEMA-System Revalidation
requirement_topic.zh: 巴哈马BPL并网——120/240 V、60 Hz NEMA体系重新验证
requirement_topic.zht: 巴哈馬BPL併網——120/240 V、60 Hz NEMA體系重新驗證

summary.en: Solar PV inverters connected in The Bahamas must be configured for a US-heritage low-voltage grid, commonly 120/240 V at 60 Hz, and for Bahamas Power and Light (BPL) project interconnection review. Because the market is 60 Hz, grid-support and anti-islanding evidence should be framed in the Americas direction, commonly IEEE 1547 for distributed energy resource interconnection and UL 1741 for inverter certification, where required by the project owner, utility, insurer, or authority having jurisdiction. European 50 Hz framing such as EN 50549 or VDE-AR-N 4105 should not be assumed to satisfy Bahamas interconnection expectations.
summary.zh: 接入巴哈马电网的太阳能光伏逆变器须按美式低压电网配置，常见为120/240 V、60 Hz，并接受Bahamas Power and Light（BPL）项目并网审查。由于目标市场为60 Hz，电网支撑和防孤岛证据应按美洲方向组织，通常在项目业主、公用事业、保险方或主管机构要求时参考IEEE 1547分布式能源并网及UL 1741逆变器认证。不得假定EN 50549或VDE-AR-N 4105等欧洲50 Hz框架可满足巴哈马并网期望。
summary.zht: 接入巴哈馬電網的太陽能光伏逆變器須按美式低壓電網配置，常見為120/240 V、60 Hz，並接受Bahamas Power and Light（BPL）項目併網審查。由於目標市場為60 Hz，電網支撐和防孤島證據應按美洲方向組織，通常在項目業主、公用事業、保險方或主管機構要求時參考IEEE 1547分散式能源併網及UL 1741逆變器認證。不得假定EN 50549或VDE-AR-N 4105等歐洲50 Hz框架可滿足巴哈馬併網期望。

standards_or_laws: Bahamas Power and Light (BPL) — project-level electrical interconnection review and utility requirements
IEEE 1547 — Standard for Interconnection and Interoperability of Distributed Energy Resources with Associated Electric Power Systems Interfaces (likely Americas-direction reference)
UL 1741 — Inverters, Converters, Controllers and Interconnection System Equipment for Use With Distributed Energy Resources (may be requested for US-heritage systems)
Bahamas utility supply context — commonly 120/240 V, 60 Hz, NEMA-style equipment ecosystem

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 evidence developed for China domestic grid conditions. China is a 220/380 V, 50 Hz market. Even where a Chinese inverter has anti-islanding, voltage/frequency protection, ride-through, and reconnection test evidence, those settings are not automatically transferable to a 120/240 V, 60 Hz Bahamas grid or to IEEE 1547 / UL 1741 style project expectations.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024，均基于中国国内电网条件。中国为220/380 V、50 Hz市场。即使中国逆变器已有防孤岛、电压/频率保护、穿越和重连测试证据，这些设定也不能自动转移到巴哈马120/240 V、60 Hz电网，或IEEE 1547 / UL 1741式项目期望。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024，均基於中國國內電網條件。中國為220/380 V、50 Hz市場。即使中國逆變器已有防孤島、電壓/頻率保護、穿越和重連測試證據，這些設定也不能自動轉移到巴哈馬120/240 V、60 Hz電網，或IEEE 1547 / UL 1741式項目期望。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
GB/T 156 — 标准电压 (Standard voltages), China 220/380 V 50 Hz context

gap.en: Gap: this is a fundamental voltage and frequency mismatch. China 220/380 V, 50 Hz validation does not prove Bahamas 120/240 V, 60 Hz interconnection compatibility. Exporters should prepare a Bahamas configuration dossier covering 60 Hz firmware, IEEE 1547 / UL 1741 evidence where requested, anti-islanding trip times, voltage/frequency windows, ride-through settings, reconnection delays, NEMA-compatible wiring and terminals, and BPL project-specific approval. Any model previously tested only under Chinese 50 Hz settings should be revalidated at 60 Hz before shipment or project submission.
gap.zh: 差距：这是根本性的电压和频率不匹配。中国220/380 V、50 Hz验证不能证明适配巴哈马120/240 V、60 Hz并网。出口商应准备巴哈马配置文件，覆盖60 Hz固件、在被要求时的IEEE 1547 / UL 1741证据、防孤岛跳闸时间、电压/频率窗口、穿越设定、重连延迟、NEMA兼容接线和端子，以及BPL项目特定批准。任何仅在中国50 Hz设定下测试过的型号，均应在出货或项目提交前按60 Hz重新验证。
gap.zht: 差距：這是根本性的電壓和頻率不匹配。中國220/380 V、50 Hz驗證不能證明適配巴哈馬120/240 V、60 Hz併網。出口商應準備巴哈馬配置文件，覆蓋60 Hz韌體、在被要求時的IEEE 1547 / UL 1741證據、防孤島跳脫時間、電壓/頻率窗口、穿越設定、重連延遲、NEMA相容接線和端子，以及BPL項目特定批准。任何僅在中國50 Hz設定下測試過的型號，均應在出貨或項目提交前按60 Hz重新驗證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for BPL interconnection and project acceptance; the exact document set should be confirmed with BPL, URCA-regulated utility requirements, the project engineer, and the authority having jurisdiction
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese GB/T grid-connection evidence may support China domestic acceptance but does not transfer to Bahamas 60 Hz BPL interconnection acceptance

source.publisher: Bahamas Power and Light Company Ltd. (BPL)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Bahamas PV inverter interconnection as a 60 Hz Americas-style review, not a 50 Hz China or Europe review. Revalidate Chinese GB/T 37408 / NB/T 32004 / GB/T 19964 evidence for 120/240 V, 60 Hz operation, and confirm whether IEEE 1547 and UL 1741 evidence is required by BPL, the project owner, or the authority having jurisdiction before submitting equipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将巴哈马光伏逆变器并网视为60 Hz美洲体系审查，而非50 Hz中国或欧洲体系审查。须针对120/240 V、60 Hz运行重新验证中国GB/T 37408 / NB/T 32004 / GB/T 19964证据，并在提交设备前确认BPL、项目业主或主管机构是否要求IEEE 1547和UL 1741证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將巴哈馬光伏逆變器併網視為60 Hz美洲體系審查，而非50 Hz中國或歐洲體系審查。須針對120/240 V、60 Hz運行重新驗證中國GB/T 37408 / NB/T 32004 / GB/T 19964證據，並在提交設備前確認BPL、項目業主或主管機構是否要求IEEE 1547和UL 1741證據。

requirement_topic.en: Regulatory and Project-Gate Review — URCA Oversight, BBSQ Standards Context, and Hurricane-Prone Island Conditions
requirement_topic.zh: 监管和项目门槛审查——URCA监管、BBSQ标准背景及飓风多发岛屿条件
requirement_topic.zht: 監管和項目門檻審查——URCA監管、BBSQ標準背景及颶風多發島嶼條件

summary.en: The Bahamas electricity sector is overseen by the Utilities Regulation and Competition Authority (URCA), while the Bahamas Bureau of Standards and Quality (BBSQ) is the national standards body. PV inverter acceptance is therefore not just a factory certificate question: projects may need to satisfy utility interconnection review, applicable national standards or adopted standards, local electrical inspection practice, procurement requirements, and insurer or financier requirements. Because The Bahamas is a hurricane-prone island market, outdoor PV equipment packages should also document enclosure ratings, corrosion resistance, surge protection coordination, mounting interface assumptions, and environmental suitability for coastal exposure.
summary.zh: 巴哈马电力行业由Utilities Regulation and Competition Authority（URCA）监管，Bahamas Bureau of Standards and Quality（BBSQ）为国家标准机构。因此，光伏逆变器接受度不仅是工厂证书问题：项目可能需要满足公用事业并网审查、适用国家标准或采纳标准、当地电气检查实践、采购要求，以及保险方或融资方要求。由于巴哈马为飓风多发岛屿市场，户外光伏设备包还应记录外壳等级、耐腐蚀性、浪涌保护配合、安装接口假设及沿海暴露环境适用性。
summary.zht: 巴哈馬電力行業由Utilities Regulation and Competition Authority（URCA）監管，Bahamas Bureau of Standards and Quality（BBSQ）為國家標準機構。因此，光伏逆變器接受度不僅是工廠證書問題：項目可能需要滿足公用事業併網審查、適用國家標準或採納標準、當地電氣檢查實務、採購要求，以及保險方或融資方要求。由於巴哈馬為颶風多發島嶼市場，戶外光伏設備包還應記錄外殼等級、耐腐蝕性、浪湧保護配合、安裝接口假設及沿海暴露環境適用性。

standards_or_laws: Utilities Regulation and Competition Authority (URCA) — electricity-sector regulatory oversight in The Bahamas
Bahamas Bureau of Standards and Quality (BBSQ) — national standards and quality infrastructure
Bahamas Power and Light (BPL) — project-specific grid interconnection and utility acceptance
Project-owner, insurer, and local authority requirements for hurricane-prone coastal installations

summary.en: China domestic PV inverter files often focus on factory type tests, CNAS laboratory reports, CQC/CGC voluntary certification, and China grid-code compatibility. These files usually do not address Bahamas utility approval workflow, URCA-regulated electricity-sector context, BBSQ standards status, NEMA-style installation practice, coastal corrosion exposure, hurricane wind-event assumptions, or insurer-driven documentation.
summary.zh: 中国国内光伏逆变器文件通常侧重工厂型式试验、CNAS实验室报告、CQC/CGC自愿认证及中国电网规范兼容性。这些文件通常不覆盖巴哈马公用事业审批流程、URCA监管的电力行业背景、BBSQ标准状态、NEMA式安装实践、沿海腐蚀暴露、飓风风事件假设或保险方驱动的文件要求。
summary.zht: 中國國內光伏逆變器文件通常側重工廠型式試驗、CNAS實驗室報告、CQC/CGC自願認證及中國電網規範相容性。這些文件通常不覆蓋巴哈馬公用事業審批流程、URCA監管的電力行業背景、BBSQ標準狀態、NEMA式安裝實務、沿海腐蝕暴露、颶風風事件假設或保險方驅動的文件要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC/CGC voluntary certification schemes for China PV inverter products

gap.en: Gap: Chinese documentation should be supplemented with a Bahamas project file that identifies the utility interconnection path, applicable BBSQ or adopted standards, URCA or licence-related constraints if relevant, local inspection requirements, 60 Hz settings, NEMA-compatible installation details, enclosure and surge-protection evidence, and hurricane/coastal environmental suitability. Do not rely on a China domestic certificate package as the sole project approval file.
gap.zh: 差距：中国文件应补充巴哈马项目文件，明确公用事业并网路径、适用BBSQ或采纳标准、如相关则包括URCA或许可限制、当地检查要求、60 Hz设定、NEMA兼容安装细节、外壳和浪涌保护证据，以及飓风/沿海环境适用性。不得将中国国内证书包作为唯一项目批准文件。
gap.zht: 差距：中國文件應補充巴哈馬項目文件，明確公用事業併網路徑、適用BBSQ或採納標準、如相關則包括URCA或許可限制、當地檢查要求、60 Hz設定、NEMA相容安裝細節、外殼和浪湧保護證據，以及颶風/沿海環境適用性。不得將中國國內證書包作為唯一項目批准文件。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but mandatory in practice where utility, regulator, inspector, owner, financier, or insurer acceptance is required before energisation
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic documentation is not structured around Bahamas BBSQ / URCA / BPL project acceptance and should be treated only as supporting evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Build a Bahamas-specific project dossier rather than submitting China domestic certificates alone. Confirm the BBSQ standards position, URCA-regulated electricity-sector constraints, BPL interconnection route, and hurricane/coastal environmental documentation expectations with the project engineer and relevant authority before procurement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应建立巴哈马项目专用文件包，而非仅提交中国国内证书。采购前请与项目工程师和相关主管机构确认BBSQ标准状态、URCA监管电力行业限制、BPL并网路径，以及飓风/沿海环境文件期望。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應建立巴哈馬項目專用文件包，而非僅提交中國國內證書。採購前請與項目工程師和相關主管機構確認BBSQ標準狀態、URCA監管電力行業限制、BPL併網路徑，以及颶風/沿海環境文件期望。
